This is literally an arc of when Izuku went off on his own to try to stop AFO and Shigaraki. But of course face backlash from society and had to face Muscular and Lady Nagant. Then the jailbreak take place with in this bot as well..

i put Endeavor hawks all might best jeanist deku AFO lady nagant muscular and class 1-A in this bot.

The initial message I tried to make it open so you can do or start off however you want.


I tried to make it where you can be whoever you want I didn't dictate who user is in this so you can be teacher, student, hero, villain, vigilante, civilian idc lol just have fun.

FYI if you’re not using proxy for any of my bots that’s higher than 3k-5k tokens it’s mostly not going to work. Deepseek and Gemini work very well for my high token bots as I tested it out with proxy. So yeah if you only JLLM you’re going to have JLLM issues.
